assertion_results.text: Step 1 extracts imprecise affected range from the Jira description — the description lacks a specific version threshold (Step 1 Data Extraction)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 15: 'Affected version range | versions prior to the fix (imprecise -- no specific threshold in Jira description)' and line 16: 'Fixed version | see advisory (imprecise -- no specific version in Jira description)'. Lines 43-47 contain an explicit 'Imprecise Data Flag' section stating: 'The Jira description does not provide a precise affected version range or fixed version for the h2 library. It states "versions prior to the fix" and "see advisory" respectively.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries MITRE CVE API and extracts lessThan 0.4.8 as the fix threshold from the affected[].versions[] field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md line 7: 'Source: https://cveawg.mitre.org/api/cve/CVE-2026-48901'. Line 15: 'Affected range | lessThan 0.4.8'. Lines 19-20: 'The MITRE CVE record specifies that all versions of h2 with version less than 0.4.8 are affected (semver comparison). The fix threshold is 0.4.8.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries OSV.dev API and extracts fixed version 0.4.8 from the affected[].ranges[].events field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md line 23: 'Source: https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/CVE-2026-48901'. Lines 35-36: 'Introduced | 0 (all versions)' and 'Fixed | 0.4.8'. Lines 38-39: 'The OSV.dev record confirms the vulnerability was introduced from the initial version and is fixed at 0.4.8.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 cross-validation shows agreement between MITRE and OSV.dev — the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) is used as the authoritative value for Step 2.3
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 53-54: 'Agreement across external sources. Both MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev agree on the fix threshold: h2 < 0.4.8 is affected, >= 0.4.8 is fixed.' Lines 62-65: 'Fix threshold for Step 2: h2 >= 0.4.8 (not affected), h2 < 0.4.8 (affected)' and 'This enriched threshold from the external CVE databases takes precedence over the imprecise Jira description data, per the Step 1.5 cross-validation protocol.'

assertion_results.text: Step 2.3 version impact comparison uses the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md lines 4-8: 'From Step 1.5 cross-validation: h2 < 0.4.8 is affected, h2 >= 0.4.8 is not affected. Both MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev agree on this threshold. The Jira description was imprecise ("versions prior to the fix") and could not be used alone.' Line 12 uses the enriched threshold: 'Version Impact for CVE-2026-48901 (h2 < 0.4.8):'. All version comparisons in the impact table explicitly compare against the 0.4.8 fix threshold (e.g., line 18: 'h2 0.4.8 >= 0.4.8 (at or above fix threshold)', line 31: 'h2 0.4.5 < 0.4.8 (below fix threshold)').
